project_type: Vanilla JavaScript SPA (financial management app) deployed on Netlify
build_system: No build system - static HTML/JS files served directly by Netlify
verification_instructions: Open index.html in a browser, log in, create/edit journal entries, then check if the Posisi Saldo Hari Ini report reflects the updated values
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML/JS files
environment_constraints: No build tools needed. Changes are to plain JS files. Firebase Firestore is used as database with localStorage as cache/fallback.
key_patterns: KDB.save(collection, id, data) saves to localStorage + Firebase. KDB.getAll(collection) fetches from Firebase (if ready) and caches to localStorage. getFinancialData() is the central function that computes all account balances from journal entries + saldo awal settings.
directory_structure: Root: index.html (UI), keuangan-app.js (all app logic), keuangan-firebase.js (data layer), netlify/ (serverless functions)
